powerRankings.title: Tier 1 Power Rankings
powerRankings.prompt: Write a Tier 1 power rankings article for November 1981. Rank the teams yourself using the context below. Use overall season-to-date performance as the base ranking logic, and use the latest sim performance to explain changes, jumps, or drops from the previous board. Explicitly note changes from the last published power rankings article if those changes feel meaningful, but do not force movement notes for every team. You are allowed to pull extra context from any of the linked JSON sources if it strengthens the board.
writerNotes: Use the team pool as context, not as a locked final order.
Base the ranking on overall form, not just one sim.
Use the latest sim to justify movement, momentum, and skepticism.
Call out at least one riser, one faller, and one team you are still unsure about.

promotionRelegationWatch.title: Promotion / Relegation Watch
promotionRelegationWatch.prompt: Write a promotion/relegation watch article for November 1981. Cover Tier 1 relegation, Tier 2 promotion and relegation, and Tier 3 promotion. Focus on the live line, the closest chasers, and who has momentum. You can use any of the linked JSON context if it helps explain why a race is tightening or loosening.
writerNotes: Tier 1 has 2 relegation spots.
Tier 2 has 2 promotion spots and 1 relegation spot.
Tier 3 has 1 promotion spot.
Explain the pressure line clearly before making bigger editorial claims.

stockUpStockDown.title: Stock Up / Stock Down
stockUpStockDown.prompt: Write a Stock Up / Stock Down piece for November 1981. Pick exactly three teams up and three teams down from the latest sim and explain the change in plain language. You can pull supporting detail from any linked JSON source if a team's monthly record alone is too thin.
writerNotes: Do not just sort by record; explain why the shape of the month matters.
A close 1-0 month can be less convincing than a dominant 1-0 month.
Use concise, punchy sections rather than one long essay.

monthInReview.title: Month in Review
monthInReview.prompt: Write a Month in Review feature for November 1981. Use the featured storylines below to build a coherent recap of the sim: best performances, biggest swings, weirdest result, and what matters next. You can pull from any linked JSON source if the strongest story sits outside the featured shortlist.
writerNotes: Lead with the strongest monthly theme, not just the biggest scoreline.
Work across tiers if the month demands it.
End with a forward-looking note about next month.

featuredStorylines.title: Biggest Blowout of the Month
featuredStorylines.summary: Sporting CP beat Tottenham Hotspur by 34, the biggest margin of the sim.

featuredStorylines.title: Hottest Team of the Month
featuredStorylines.summary: Brighton posted the strongest month at 1-0 and closed on a W1 run.

featuredStorylines.title: Closest Game of the Month
featuredStorylines.summary: Manchester City edged Valencia by 1 in the tightest finish of the sim.

featuredStorylines.title: Coldest Team of the Month
featuredStorylines.summary: AC Milan had the roughest month at 0-1 and now carries a L1 slide.

featuredStorylines.title: Upset of the Month
featuredStorylines.summary: Manchester City landed the sharpest upset of the sim by beating Paris Saint-Germain.
